since_last: 69% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +7.21%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 69% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.08% · BTC -4.19% · Gold -3.01% · Nasdaq100 +2.48%. 69% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +7.21%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +7.21%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.29%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMR is the standout at +13.06%
cards.body: Leaders: SMR +13.06%, CEVA +11.09%, LSCC +10.97%, SMCI +10.91%, INTC +10.73%. Laggards: INOD -7.04%, SPCX -4.85%, IBM -4.57%, WDAY -3.81%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.85% at $182.52
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.85% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
